# Filtering metacells

## Setup

Library

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(mcRigor)
library(magrittr)
```

Vars

```{r}
path_mc_label_dir <- "outputs/notebooks-new/MetaCell"
sample_names <- c(
  "ptr_tenx_tso2",
  "ptr_tenx_tso3",
  "ptr_tenx_tso4",
  "ptr_tenx_tst2",
  "ptr_tenx_tst3",
  "ptr_tenx_tst4",
  "ptr_tenx_tsv2",
  "ptr_tenx_tsv3",
  "ptr_tenx_tsv4",
  "ptr_tenx_tsv5",
  "ptr_tenx_batch2"
)
func_path_10x_matrix <- function(sample_names) {
  sprintf(
    "outputs/CellRanger/count/%s/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix",
    sample_names
)
}
func_path_memberships <-function(sample_name) {
  sprintf(
    "outputs/notebooks-new/MetaCell/%s.csv",
    sample_name
  ) 
}
```

Filter metacells

```{r}
for (sample_name in sample_names) {
  obj_singlecell <- func_path_10x_matrix(sample_name) %>% 
    Read10X %>% CreateSeuratObject
  cell_membership <- read.csv(
    func_path_memberships(sample_name),
    header = TRUE,
    row.names = 1
  )
  colnames(cell_membership) <- c("0")
  detect_res = mcRigor_DETECT(
    obj_singlecell = obj_singlecell, 
    cell_membership = cell_membership,
    tgamma = NULL,
    assay_type = 'RNA',
    feature_use = 2000,
    aggregate_method = 'mean',
    Nrep = 1,
    test_cutoff = 0.05,
    thre_smooth = TRUE,
    thre_bw = 1/6
  )
  print(sample_name)
}
```
